name: Arugula Salad Orange Couscous and Citrus Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the water and couscous. Stir until the water is absorbed.
2. Add the orange segments (seeds removed) to the couscous mixture. Mix well.
3. Chop the mango into small cubes and add it to the bowl with the other ingredients.
4. Add the chopped basil, chives, cumin, and toasted pine nuts to the salad. Stir gently until everything is evenly distributed.
5. Tear the arugula leaves into bite-sized pieces and add them to the bowl.
6. Mix the salad lightly without overworking it.
